gewaehr: Orientierung, keine rechtsverbindliche Auskunft, ohne Gewaehr. Zustaendigkeiten, Unterlagen, Fristen und Gebuehren koennen je nach Bundesland und Kommune abweichen und sich aendern. Fuer Verbindliches stets die offizielle Servicesuche bzw. die zustaendige Behoerde pruefen.
hinweisDeepLink: Die App sollte beim Aufruf der offiziellen Suche PLZ/Standort und Anliegen an die Basis-URL anhaengen.

unterlagen: ID card or passport for every person being registered
If applicable, marriage/birth certificates for families
schritte: Book an appointment at the registration office (Bürgeramt)
Ask your landlord for the confirmation of tenancy (Wohnungsgeberbestätigung)
Register within the deadline after moving in
Hand in the form and show your ID documents
hinweise: Usually free of charge
Deadline is normally within 2 weeks of moving in
Registering late can result in a fine

anliegen.titel: Change your registered address (moving within Germany)
unterlagen: Confirmation of tenancy from the new landlord (Wohnungsgeberbestätigung)
schritte: Book an appointment at your new place of residence
Obtain the confirmation of tenancy (Wohnungsgeberbestätigung)
Register at your new address within the deadline
The address on your ID card will be updated
hinweise: A separate deregistration at your old address is usually not needed when moving within Germany
The deadline is normally 2 weeks
Usually free of charge

anliegen.titel: Deregister your address (moving abroad / secondary residence)
schritte: You can deregister at the earliest shortly before you move out
Fill in the form
Submit it to the registration office (Bürgeramt) – often possible by post or online
hinweise: Required when moving abroad or giving up a secondary residence (Nebenwohnung)
No deregistration needed when moving within Germany
Usually free of charge

anliegen.titel: Apply for or renew a German ID card (Personalausweis)
unterlagen: Your current ID card (Personalausweis) or passport
Digital biometric passport photo (mandatory since May 2025)
For a first application, birth or marriage certificate if required
schritte: Book an appointment
Have a digital biometric photo taken (at a terminal in the office or at a connected photographer)
Attend in person – your fingerprints will be taken
Collect the ID card or have it sent to your home for a fee
hinweise: Since 1 May 2025 only digital biometric photos are accepted – paper photos are no longer allowed
Direct delivery to your home is possible for a fee
You must appear in person

anliegen.amtstyp: Residents' registration office / passport authority (Bürgeramt / Passbehörde)
unterlagen: Digital biometric passport photo (mandatory since May 2025)
Birth or marriage certificate if required
schritte: Book an appointment
Have a digital biometric photo taken
Attend in person
Collect the passport or have it sent to your home
hinweise: Digital passport photos have been mandatory since May 2025
An express passport is available for an extra charge
You must appear in person

unterlagen: Vehicle registration certificates Part I and Part II (Zulassungsbescheinigung Teil I und Teil II)
eVB number (electronic confirmation of insurance cover, eVB-Nummer)
SEPA direct debit mandate for the vehicle tax (Kfz-Steuer)
For a used vehicle, a valid roadworthiness/emissions test certificate (HU/AU)
schritte: Get the eVB number from your car insurer
Book an appointment at the registration office (Zulassungsstelle)
Present your documents
Have the licence plates stamped and the car registered
Attach the inspection stickers
hinweise: Many registrations can be done online (i-Kfz)
Fees apply

unterlagen: Vehicle registration certificates Part I and Part II (Zulassungsbescheinigung Teil I und Teil II)
Proof of a valid roadworthiness test (HU)
schritte: Get an eVB number (when the owner changes)
Book an appointment
Present your documents
New licence plates if required
hinweise: When moving within Germany you can usually keep your licence plates
Partly possible online via i-Kfz

anliegen.titel: Deregister a car (take it off the road)
unterlagen: Vehicle registration certificate Part I (Zulassungsbescheinigung Teil I)
Licence plates with the registration seal
schritte: Book an appointment or do it online via i-Kfz
Present or hand in the plates and the registration certificate
Get the deregistration confirmed
hinweise: Online deregistration (i-Kfz) is usually possible
Small fee

anliegen.titel: Apply for a driving licence (first issue)
unterlagen: Proof of a first aid course (Erste-Hilfe-Kurs)
schritte: Take the eyesight test and the first aid course
Apply at the driving licence authority (often handled by the driving school)
Pass the theory and practical tests
Collect your driving licence
hinweise: Paper passport photos are still accepted for driving licences (unlike for ID cards and passports)
Apply a few weeks before your test

schritte: Check the exchange deadline for your year of birth
Apply at the driving licence authority (Führerscheinstelle)
Collect your new card-format driving licence
hinweise: Deadlines are staggered by year of birth or year of issue
Paper passport photos are accepted

anliegen.amtstyp: Trade office / public order office (Gewerbeamt / Ordnungsamt)
unterlagen: Any permits or licences required for your activity
Extract from the commercial register (Handelsregisterauszug) if applicable
schritte: Fill in the form
Register at the trade office (Gewerbeamt) – often possible online
Pay the fee
The tax office (Finanzamt) will then contact you for tax registration
hinweise: Registering automatically notifies the tax office (Finanzamt) and the chamber of commerce or crafts (IHK/HWK)
The fee depends on your municipality

schritte: Fill in the form
Submit it to the trade office (Gewerbeamt) – often possible online
hinweise: Often free of charge or only a small fee
Remember to inform the tax office (Finanzamt) as well

unterlagen: ID card or passport of both partners
Recent certified copy from the register of births (beglaubigte Abschrift aus dem Geburtenregister)
If applicable, proof regarding previous marriages (divorce decree, death certificate)
schritte: Book an appointment at the registry office (Standesamt) where you live to give notice
Gather all the documents
Give notice together in person
Arrange a date for the ceremony
hinweise: Get the documents early – processing takes time
The exact requirements can vary from case to case

anliegen.amtstyp: Registry office of the place of birth (Standesamt)
unterlagen: Personal details (name, date and place of birth)
Proof that you are entitled to the certificate, if required
schritte: Find the responsible registry office (the one at the place of birth)
Submit the application (often possible online or by post)
Pay the fee
Receive the certificate by post or collect it
hinweise: Only certain people are entitled to request the certificate
A fee applies per certificate

anliegen.titel: Register a death / apply for a death certificate
anliegen.amtstyp: Registry office of the place of death (Standesamt)
unterlagen: ID card of the person reporting the death
Birth or marriage certificate of the deceased
schritte: Report the death to the registry office promptly (often done by the funeral director)
Submit the documents
Request as many copies of the death certificate as you need
hinweise: The funeral director often takes care of the formalities
Several copies are useful for insurers and pension providers

anliegen.amtstyp: Family benefits office at the Federal Employment Agency (Familienkasse, Bundesagentur für Arbeit)
unterlagen: Tax identification number (Steuer-Identifikationsnummer) of the child and of the applicant
Child benefit application form (Antrag auf Kindergeld)
schritte: Apply online or in writing to the family benefits office (Familienkasse)
Attach the birth certificate and the tax IDs
Wait for the decision
hinweise: Child benefit is only paid retroactively for a limited period – apply as soon as possible

unterlagen: The child's birth certificate (marked for use for Elterngeld)
Certificate from your health insurer about maternity benefits
schritte: Apply to the responsible parental allowance office (Elterngeldstelle)
Attach the supporting documents
Wait for your application to be processed
hinweise: Payments are backdated only for the child's most recent months of life – apply as soon as possible
Which office is responsible varies from state to state

anliegen.titel: Tax registration / tax number (tax office, Finanzamt)
unterlagen: Details of your activity and your expected income
schritte: When starting self-employed work, fill in the tax registration questionnaire (Fragebogen zur steuerlichen Erfassung) via ELSTER
Send it to the responsible tax office (Finanzamt)
Wait for your tax number
hinweise: The tax identification number (Steuer-Identifikationsnummer) is issued automatically and sent by post
For self-employed people: use the questionnaire in ELSTER

anliegen.titel: Apply for a certificate of good conduct (Führungszeugnis)
anliegen.amtstyp: Residents' registration office (Bürgeramt); issued by the Federal Office of Justice (Bundesamt für Justiz)
unterlagen: Statement of the intended purpose, if required
schritte: Apply at the registration office (Bürgeramt) or online at the Federal Office of Justice (Bundesamt für Justiz)
Pay the fee
Receive the certificate by post
hinweise: You can apply online using the eID function of your ID card
Delivery takes a few days

anliegen.titel: Apply for a resident parking permit (Bewohnerparkausweis)
anliegen.amtstyp: Residents' registration office / road traffic authority (Bürgeramt / Straßenverkehrsbehörde)
unterlagen: ID card showing a registered address inside the parking zone
Vehicle registration certificate Part I (car registered to the applicant)
schritte: Check which parking zone applies to you
Submit the application (often possible online)
Pay the fee
Receive your permit
hinweise: Only for residents of the respective parking zone
Usually has to be renewed every year
